message:
test(proptest): add 60 property tests for viewport_reflow_planner and query_contract (wa-1u90p.7.1)

New proptest_viewport_reflow_planner.rs (25 tests): coverage completeness,
non-overlapping batches, priority ordering, batch size bounds, frame budget
greedy selection, scheduler class mapping, determinism, work unit consistency,
scheduling hooks, log lines, serde roundtrip, resize intent conversion,
cold scrollback interleaving, empty/degenerate inputs.

New proptest_query_contract.rs (35 tests): parse validation defaults/bounds,
limit/time range validation, mode invariants (serde, as_str, support check),
query serde roundtrip, None field omission, storage options mapping, error
code stability, lint handling (errors, format_lint_hint).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
